children.heading: Financial assistance for employee wages, salaries, and benefits
children.label: a Financial assistance for employee wages, salaries, and benefits

children.text: passenger air carriers, in an aggregate amount up to $25,000,000,000;
cargo air carriers, in the aggregate amount up to $4,000,000,000; and
contractors, in an aggregate amount up to $3,000,000,000.

children.heading: Administrative expenses
children.label: b Administrative expenses
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, the Secretary, may use $67,000,000 of the funds made available under section 9080(a) of this title for costs and administrative expenses associated with providing financial assistance under this part.1So in original. There is no subsec. (a) in .1section 9080 of this title
